sourceMovie.title: Red Lights
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Red Lights works as a thriller movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Source Code
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Red Lights clicked for you, Source Code (2011) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Red Lights?
faq.answer: Try Source Code, The Game, Enemy—each shares DNA with Red Lights while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Red Lights?
faq.answer: Red Lights (2012) is best described as Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Red Lights worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
